requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — KS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——KS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——KS IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs entering Kenya are assessed for safety against the Kenya Standard that adopts IEC 62133 — typically KS IEC 62133-2 (Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems). KEBS administers conformity through the PVoC programme: a regulated consignment must demonstrate, via test reports from a recognised laboratory, that the cells/packs meet the applicable KS IEC 62133 abuse and performance criteria (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge). Power banks for mobile devices may also be assessed against the relevant KS for portable power banks. A KEBS Certificate of Conformity is issued before shipment and the Import Standardization Mark (ISM) is applied. Kenya adopts the IEC text, so the technical content closely tracks the international standard.
summary.zh: 进入肯尼亚的便携式锂电芯及电池组，按采用IEC 62133的肯尼亚标准评估安全——通常为KS IEC 62133-2（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质的二次电芯及电池——便携式应用用密封二次锂电芯及由其构成电池的安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）。KEBS通过PVoC计划实施合格评定：受管制货物须凭获认可实验室出具的测试报告，证明电芯/电池组满足适用的KS IEC 62133滥用及性能准则（过充、短路、挤压、撞击、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）。移动设备用移动电源还可按相关KS评估。KEBS在装运前签发符合性证书并加施进口标准化标志（ISM）。肯尼亚采用IEC文本，故技术内容与国际标准高度一致。
summary.zht: 進入肯亞的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，按採用IEC 62133的肯亞標準評估安全——通常為KS IEC 62133-2（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質的二次電芯及電池——便攜式應用用密封二次鋰電芯及由其構成電池的安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）。KEBS通過PVoC計劃實施合格評定：受管制貨物須憑獲認可實驗室出具的測試報告，證明電芯/電池組滿足適用的KS IEC 62133濫用及性能準則（過充、短路、擠壓、撞擊、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）。行動設備用行動電源還可按相關KS評估。KEBS在裝運前簽發符合性證書並加施進口標準化標誌（ISM）。肯亞採用IEC文本，故技術內容與國際標準高度一致。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems (Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62133-2)
Standards Act (Cap 496) and KEBS PVoC programme — conformity assessment and Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), supplemented by GB 18287 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 test report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory is not, by itself, accepted to close out Kenyan PVoC — KEBS assesses against KS IEC 62133 and requires test evidence acceptable to the PVoC inspection body, although because both derive from IEC 62133-2 the underlying engineering basis is similar.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），并辅以GB 18287（手机用锂离子电池）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241测试报告本身不足以完成肯尼亚PVoC——KEBS依据KS IEC 62133评定，并要求PVoC检验机构可接受的测试证据；不过由于两者均源自IEC 62133-2，其底层工程基础相近。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），並輔以GB 18287（手機用鋰離子電池）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241測試報告本身不足以完成肯亞PVoC——KEBS依據KS IEC 62133評定，並要求PVoC檢驗機構可接受的測試證據；不過由於兩者均源自IEC 62133-2，其底層工程基礎相近。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because both KS IEC 62133 and GB 31241 descend from IEC 62133-2, the engineering content is close — but the conformity route differs. A Chinese GB 31241 report does not automatically discharge Kenyan PVoC obligations: KEBS (through its appointed PVoC inspection body) needs test evidence against KS IEC 62133 acceptable for issuing the Certificate of Conformity, plus correct marking/labelling and the Import Standardization Mark. Exporters who already hold IEC 62133-2 testing (e.g., a CB Scheme report) are generally well positioned, since a CB/IEC 62133-2 report is widely accepted within PVoC; a GB-only report may require gap-filling or re-testing to the IEC-aligned KS. Key practical gaps: (1) test report must reference the KS/IEC 62133 acceptance criteria, not GB-only criteria; (2) the consignment must be enrolled in PVoC before shipment; (3) marking and capacity labelling must meet the applicable KS.
gap.zh: 由于KS IEC 62133与GB 31241均源自IEC 62133-2，工程内容相近——但合格评定路径不同。中国GB 31241报告不会自动免除肯尼亚PVoC义务：KEBS（经其指定的PVoC检验机构）须有依据KS IEC 62133、可用于签发符合性证书的测试证据，并须正确标识/标签及加施进口标准化标志。已持有IEC 62133-2测试（如CB体系报告）的出口商通常较为有利，因为CB/IEC 62133-2报告在PVoC中被广泛接受；仅有GB报告者可能需补充测试或按与IEC一致的KS重新测试。主要实务差距：（1）测试报告须引用KS/IEC 62133验收准则，而非仅GB准则；（2）货物须在装运前纳入PVoC；（3）标识与容量标签须符合适用KS。
gap.zht: 由於KS IEC 62133與GB 31241均源自IEC 62133-2，工程內容相近——但合格評定路徑不同。中國GB 31241報告不會自動免除肯亞PVoC義務：KEBS（經其指定的PVoC檢驗機構）須有依據KS IEC 62133、可用於簽發符合性證書的測試證據，並須正確標識/標籤及加施進口標準化標誌。已持有IEC 62133-2測試（如CB體系報告）的出口商通常較為有利，因為CB/IEC 62133-2報告在PVoC中被廣泛接受；僅有GB報告者可能需補充測試或按與IEC一致的KS重新測試。主要實務差距：（1）測試報告須引用KS/IEC 62133驗收準則，而非僅GB準則；（2）貨物須在裝運前納入PVoC；（3）標識與容量標籤須符合適用KS。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KS IEC 62133 safety conformity is assessed under the KEBS PVoC programme; a Certificate of Conformity and Import Standardization Mark are required before Kenyan customs clearance for regulated portable lithium batteries / power banks
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — PVoC to Standards programme and Kenya Standards catalogue

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya assesses portable lithium cell/pack safety against KS IEC 62133, administered through KEBS PVoC. Because both KS IEC 62133 and China's GB 31241 derive from IEC 62133-2, the technical basis is close, but a GB-only report does not by itself close out PVoC — an IEC 62133-2 / CB-Scheme report acceptable to the PVoC inspection body, correct KS marking, the Certificate of Conformity, and the Import Standardization Mark are required before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚依据KS IEC 62133评估便携式锂电芯/电池组安全，经KEBS PVoC实施。由于KS IEC 62133与中国GB 31241均源自IEC 62133-2，技术基础相近，但仅有GB报告本身不能完成PVoC——须有PVoC检验机构可接受的IEC 62133-2/CB体系报告、正确的KS标识、符合性证书及进口标准化标志，且在装运前完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞依據KS IEC 62133評估便攜式鋰電芯/電池組安全，經KEBS PVoC實施。由於KS IEC 62133與中國GB 31241均源自IEC 62133-2，技術基礎相近，但僅有GB報告本身不能完成PVoC——須有PVoC檢驗機構可接受的IEC 62133-2/CB體系報告、正確的KS標識、符合性證書及進口標準化標誌，且在裝運前完成。
